### audio-engine context

| 3 | Note frequency matches equal temperament tuning | audio-engine.cy.ts | should tune A4 to 440 Hz (equal temperament) | MAPPED |
| 4 | Rapid repeated taps on same note | audio-engine.cy.ts | should handle rapid repeated taps without glitches | MAPPED |
| 5 | Switching voice changes timbre | audio-engine.cy.ts | should switch voice via dropdown | MAPPED |
| 6 | Voice change applies to subsequent notes only | audio-engine.cy.ts | should not affect currently playing notes when voice changes | MAPPED |
| 7 | All five voices produce distinct sounds | audio-engine.cy.ts | should offer all five voices | MAPPED |
| 8 | Sustain pedal holds notes after key release | audio-engine.cy.ts | should hold notes after key release when sustain is active | MAPPED |
| 9 | Sustain pedal holds multiple notes | audio-engine.cy.ts | should hold multiple notes while sustain is active | MAPPED |
| 10 | Sustain pedal visual state | audio-engine.cy.ts | should show correct visual state for sustain pedal | MAPPED |

**Result: 10/10 scenarios mapped (100%)**
